fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Unitree G1. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Wave hello with one arm"
"Do a gentle squat motion"
"Perform a balancing pose on one leg"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Test how it walks on different virtual terrains"
"See how it recovers from a push"
"Simulate carrying a lightweight box"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a simple tool gripper to its hand"
"Change the colors of its links"
"Attach a sensor to its chest"
